items.caption: A checkpoint at a border crossing. there are several individuals in uniform, including police officers and possibly customs officials, standing behind a line of traffic cones. a white car is stopped at the checkpoint, and a police officer is standing in front of it, seemingly conducting a check. the checkpoint is equipped with multiple traffic lights and signs, including a red and white "stop" sign. in the background, there are trucks and a large truck with a trailer, suggesting commercial traffic. the environment appears to be an outdoor setting with a clear sky. there are no visible texts or distinctive brands in the image.
